proof:
constructor
  · decide
  · intro x hx
    have : 11 * (30 * x) ≡ 11 * 42 [MOD 47] := Nat.ModEq.mul_left 11 hx
    rw [Nat.ModEq] at this
    rw [← mul_assoc, Nat.mul_mod, show 11 * 30 % 47 = 1 by rfl, one_mul, Nat.mod_mod] at this
    rw [show 11 * 42 % 47 = 39 by rfl] at this
    rw [← this]
    apply Nat.mod_le
failed_attempts:
refine ⟨by rfl, fun x hx ↦ ?_⟩
  rw [Nat.ModEq] at hx
  have : x % 47 = 39 := calc
    x % 47 = (11 * 30 * x) % 47 := by
      rw [mul_assoc, Nat.mul_mod, show 11 * 30 % 47 = 1 by rfl, one_mul, Nat.mod_mod]
    _ = 11 * (30 * x) % 47 := by rw [mul_assoc]
    _ = 11 * 42 % 47 := by rw [Nat.mul_mod, hx, ← Nat.mul_mod]
    _ = 39 := by rfl
  rw [← this]
  exact Nat.mod_le x 47

constructor
  · rfl
  · intro x hx
    rw [← ZMod.nat_cast_eq_nat_cast_iff] at hx
    have : (x : ZMod 47) = 39 := calc
      (x : ZMod 47) = 11 * (30 * x) := by push_cast; rw [mul_assoc, show (11 : ZMod 47) * 30 = 1 by rfl, one_mul]
      _             = 11 * 42       := by push_cast at hx; rw [hx]
      _             = 39            := by rfl
    rw [ZMod.nat_cast_eq_nat_cast_iff, Nat.ModEq, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt (by norm_num)] at this
    rw [← this]
    exact Nat.mod_le x 47

constructor
  · decide
  · intro x hx
    have h : 11 * (30 * x) ≡ 11 * 42 [MOD 47] := Nat.ModEq.mul_left 11 hx
    rw [← mul_assoc] at h
    have : x ≡ 39 [MOD 47] :=
      Nat.ModEq.trans (Nat.ModEq.trans (Nat.ModEq.mul_right x (by decide : 11 * 30 ≡ 1 [MOD 47])).symm h) (by decide)
    rw [← this]
    apply Nat.mod_le

constructor
  · decide
  · intro x hx
    have h : 11 * (30 * x) ≡ 11 * 42 [MOD 47] := Nat.ModEq.mul_left 11 hx
    rw [← mul_assoc] at h
    have : x ≡ 39 [MOD 47] :=
      Nat.ModEq.trans
        (Nat.ModEq.mul_right x (show 1 ≡ 11 * 30 [MOD 47] by decide))
        (Nat.ModEq.trans h (show 11 * 42 ≡ 39 [MOD 47] by decide))
    rw [Nat.ModEq, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt (by norm_num)] at this
    rw [← this]
    apply Nat.mod_le

constructor
  · rfl
  · intro x hx
    rw [Nat.ModEq] at hx
    have : x % 47 = 39 := calc
      x % 47 = (11 * 30) * x % 47 := by rw [Nat.mul_mod, show 11 * 30 % 47 = 1 by rfl, one_mul, Nat.mod_mod]
      _      = 11 * (30 * x) % 47 := by rw [mul_assoc]
      _      = 11 * 42 % 47       := by rw [Nat.mul_mod, hx]; rfl
      _      = 39                 := by rfl
    rw [← this]
    exact x.mod_le 47

constructor
  · rfl
  · intro x hx
    have h : 30 * x ≡ 30 * 39 [MOD 47] := by rw [hx]; rfl
    have : x % 47 = 39 := Nat.ModEq.cancel_left_of_coprime (by decide) h
    rw [← Nat.div_add_mod x 47, this]
    apply Nat.le_add_right

constructor
  · rfl
  · intro x hx
    rw [← ZMod.eq_iff_modEq_nat] at hx
    have : (x : ZMod 47) = 39 :=
      calc (x : ZMod 47)
        = 11 * 30 * x := by rw [show (11 : ZMod 47) * 30 = 1 by rfl, one_mul]
        _ = 11 * 42 := by rw [mul_assoc, hx]
        _ = 39 := by rfl
    have h : x % 47 = 39 := by rw [← ZMod.val_nat_cast x, this]; rfl
    rw [← h]
    exact Nat.mod_le x 47

constructor
  · decide
  · intro x hx
    have h : x ≡ 39 [MOD 47] := Nat.ModEq.cancel_left_of_coprime (by decide) (by rw [hx]; decide)
    rw [Nat.ModEq, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt (by norm_num)] at h
    rw [← h]
    apply Nat.mod_le

constructor
  · rfl
  · intro x hx
    rw [Nat.ModEq] at hx
    have : x % 47 = 39 := by
      have h : (11 * (30 * x)) % 47 = (11 * 42) % 47 := by
        rw [Nat.mul_mod, hx, ← Nat.mul_mod]
      rwa [← mul_assoc, Nat.mul_mod, show 11 * 30 % 47 = 1 by rfl, one_mul, Nat.mod_mod, show 11 * 42 % 47 = 39 by rfl] at h
    rw [← this]
    apply Nat.mod_le

constructor
  · rfl
  · intro x hx
    have : (x : ZMod 47) = 39 := by
      apply_fun (Nat.cast : ℕ → ZMod 47) at hx
      simp only [Nat.cast_mul, Nat.cast_ofNat] at hx
      apply_fun (· * 11) at hx
      rw [mul_right_comm, show (30 : ZMod 47) * 11 = 1 by rfl, one_mul] at hx
      rwa [show (42 : ZMod 47) * 11 = 39 by rfl] at hx
    rw [← Nat.mod_eq_of_lt (by norm_num : 39 < 47), ← ZMod.val_nat_cast, ← this, ZMod.val_nat_cast]
    exact Nat.mod_le x 47

constructor
  · decide
  · intro x hx
    have h : x ≡ 39 [MOD 47] := by
      have h1 := Nat.ModEq.mul_left 11 hx
      rw [← mul_assoc] at h1
      have h2 : 11 * 30 * x ≡ 1 * x [MOD 47] :=
        Nat.ModEq.mul_right x (show 11 * 30 ≡ 1 [MOD 47] by decide)
      rw [one_mul] at h2
      exact Nat.ModEq.trans (Nat.ModEq.trans h2.symm h1) (by decide)
    rw [← Nat.mod_eq_of_lt (by decide), ← h]
    exact Nat.mod_le x 47

constructor
  · rfl
  · intro x hx
    rw [show 30 = 6 * 5 by rfl, mul_assoc, show 42 = 6 * 7 by rfl] at hx
    have h : 5 * x ≡ 7 [MOD 47] := Nat.ModEq.cancel_left_of_coprime (by norm_num) hx
    have h' : x ≡ 39 [MOD 47] := by
      calc x ≡ 1 * x [MOD 47] := by rw [one_mul]
        _ ≡ (19 * 5) * x [MOD 47] := by apply Nat.ModEq.mul_right; rfl
        _ ≡ 19 * (5 * x) [MOD 47] := by rw [mul_assoc]
        _ ≡ 19 * 7 [MOD 47] := Nat.ModEq.mul_left 19 h
        _ ≡ 39 [MOD 47] := by rfl
    rw [Nat.ModEq, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt (by norm_num)] at h'
    rw [← Nat.div_add_mod x 47, h']
    apply Nat.le_add_left

refine ⟨by decide, fun x hx ↦ ?_⟩
  have h : x ≡ 39 [MOD 47] := calc
    x ≡ 1 * x [MOD 47]         := by rw [one_mul]
    _ ≡ (11 * 30) * x [MOD 47] := Nat.ModEq.mul_right x (by decide : 11 * 30 ≡ 1 [MOD 47]).symm
    _ ≡ 11 * (30 * x) [MOD 47] := by rw [mul_assoc]
    _ ≡ 11 * 42 [MOD 47]       := Nat.ModEq.mul_left 11 hx
    _ ≡ 39 [MOD 47]            := by decide
  rw [Nat.ModEq] at h
  rw [← h]
  exact Nat.mod_le x 47

constructor
  · rfl
  · intro x hx
    rw [show 30 * x = 6 * (5 * x) by ring, show 42 = 6 * 7 by rfl] at hx
    have h : 5 * x ≡ 7 [MOD 47] := Nat.ModEq.cancel_left_of_coprime (by decide) hx
    have h := Nat.ModEq.mul_left 19 h
    rw [show 19 * (5 * x) = x + 47 * (2 * x) by ring] at h
    rw [show 19 * 7 = 39 + 47 * 2 by rfl] at h
    repeat rw [Nat.add_mul_mod_self_left] at h
    rw [Nat.ModEq, show 39 % 47 = 39 by rfl] at h
    rw [← h]
    apply Nat.mod_le

constructor
  · rfl
  · intro x hx
    have h : 11 * (30 * x) ≡ 11 * 42 [MOD 47] := Nat.ModEq.mul_left 11 hx
    rw [← mul_assoc, Nat.ModEq, Nat.mul_mod, show 330 % 47 = 1 by rfl, one_mul, Nat.mod_mod, show 462 % 47 = 39 by rfl] at h
    exact h.symm ▸ Nat.mod_le x 47

constructor
  · rfl
  · intro x hx
    change 6 * (5 * x) ≡ 6 * 7 [MOD 47] at hx
    have h : 5 * x ≡ 7 [MOD 47] := Nat.ModEq.cancel_left_of_coprime (by norm_num) hx
    apply Nat.le_of_eq_of_le (b := x % 47)
    · change 39 ≡ x [MOD 47]
      calc
        39 ≡ 133 [MOD 47]          := by rfl
        _  ≡ 19 * 7 [MOD 47]       := by rfl
        _  ≡ 19 * (5 * x) [MOD 47] := Nat.ModEq.mul_left 19 h.symm
        _  ≡ 95 * x [MOD 47]       := by ring_nf; rfl
        _  ≡ 1 * x [MOD 47]        := Nat.ModEq.mul_right x (show 95 ≡ 1 [MOD 47] by rfl)
        _  ≡ x [MOD 47]            := by rw [one_mul]
    · exact Nat.mod_le x 47

constructor
  · rfl
  · intro x hx
    have h : 30 * x ≡ 30 * 39 [MOD 47] := hx.trans (by rfl)
    have val : x ≡ 39 [MOD 47] := Nat.ModEq.cancel_left_of_coprime (by decide) h
    rw [Nat.ModEq, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt (by norm_num)] at val
    exact val ▸ Nat.mod_le x 47

constructor
  · rfl
  · intro x hx
    change 30 * x ≡ 30 * 39 [MOD 47] at hx
    rw [Nat.ModEq.cancel_left_of_coprime (by decide)] at hx
    rw [Nat.ModEq, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt (by decide)] at hx
    rw [← hx]
    exact Nat.mod_le x 47

apply IsLeast.mk
  · rfl
  · intro x hx
    have : x % 47 = 39 := by
      change x ≡ 39 [MOD 47]
      calc x ≡ 1 * x [MOD 47] := by rw [one_mul]
        _ ≡ 330 * x [MOD 47] := Nat.ModEq.mul_right x (by rfl)
        _ ≡ 11 * (30 * x) [MOD 47] := by rw [mul_assoc]
        _ ≡ 11 * 42 [MOD 47] := Nat.ModEq.mul_left 11 hx
        _ ≡ 39 [MOD 47] := by rfl
    rw [← this]
    exact Nat.mod_le x 47

constructor
  · decide
  · intro x hx
    have : x ≡ 39 [MOD 47] := calc
      x ≡ 1 * x [MOD 47] := by rw [one_mul]
      _ ≡ (11 * 30) * x [MOD 47] := Nat.ModEq.mul_right x (by decide)
      _ = 11 * (30 * x) := by rw [mul_assoc]
      _ ≡ 11 * 42 [MOD 47] := Nat.ModEq.mul_left 11 hx
      _ ≡ 39 [MOD 47] := by decide
    rw [Nat.ModEq, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt (by decide)] at this
    rw [← this]
    exact Nat.mod_le x 47

constructor
  · rfl
  · intro x hx
    have h := Nat.ModEq.mul_left 11 hx
    rw [mul_assoc] at h
    rw [Nat.mul_mod, show 330 % 47 = 1 by rfl, one_mul, Nat.mod_mod] at h
    rw [show 11 * 42 % 47 = 39 by rfl] at h
    rw [← h]
    exact Nat.mod_le x 47

constructor
  · decide
  · intro x hx
    have : 30 * x ≡ 30 * 39 [MOD 47] := Nat.ModEq.trans hx (Nat.ModEq.symm (by decide))
    have : x ≡ 39 [MOD 47] := Nat.ModEq.cancel_left_of_coprime (by decide) this
    rw [Nat.ModEq, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt (by decide)] at this
    rw [← this]
    apply Nat.mod_le

constructor
  · rfl
  · intro x hx
    have : x % 47 = 39 := calc
      x % 47 = (1 * x) % 47    := by rw [one_mul]
      _ = (330 * x) % 47       := Nat.ModEq.mul_right x (by rfl)
      _ = (11 * (30 * x)) % 47 := by rw [mul_assoc]
      _ = (11 * 42) % 47       := Nat.ModEq.mul_left 11 hx
      _ = 39                   := by rfl
    rw [← this]
    apply Nat.mod_le

constructor
  · norm_num
  · intro x hx
    rw [show 30 * x = 6 * (5 * x) by ring, show 42 = 6 * 7 by rfl] at hx
    rw [Nat.ModEq.mul_left_cancel_iff] at hx; swap; norm_num
    apply Nat.ModEq.mul_left 19 at hx
    rw [show 19 * (5 * x) = 95 * x by ring, show 19 * 7 = 133 by rfl] at hx
    have : 95 * x ≡ 1 * x [MOD 47] := Nat.ModEq.mul_right x (by norm_num)
    rw [Nat.ModEq] at hx this
    norm_num at hx
    simp only [one_mul] at this
    rw [← this] at hx
    rw [← hx]
    apply Nat.mod_le

  · rfl
  · intro x hx
    have : x ≡ 39 [MOD 47] := calc

      _ = 11 * (30 * x)          := by rw [mul_assoc]

  · rfl
  · intro x hx
    apply Nat.ModEq.mul_left 11 at hx
    rw [show 11 * (30 * x) = x + 47 * (7 * x) by ring, show 11 * 42 = 462 by rfl] at hx
    rw [Nat.ModEq, Nat.add_mul_mod_self_left, show 462 % 47 = 39 by rfl] at hx

constructor

  · intro x hx
    apply Nat.ModEq.mul_left 11 at hx
    rw [← mul_assoc] at hx
    dsimp [Nat.ModEq] at hx
    rw [Nat.mul_mod, show 11 * 30 % 47 = 1 by rfl, one_mul, Nat.mod_mod,

successful_attempts:
constructor
  · decide
  · intro x hx
    have : 11 * (30 * x) ≡ 11 * 42 [MOD 47] := Nat.ModEq.mul_left 11 hx
    rw [Nat.ModEq] at this
    rw [← mul_assoc, Nat.mul_mod, show 11 * 30 % 47 = 1 by rfl, one_mul, Nat.mod_mod] at this
    rw [show 11 * 42 % 47 = 39 by rfl] at this
    rw [← this]
    apply Nat.mod_le

constructor
  · rfl
  · intro x hx
    have key : x ≡ 39 [MOD 47] := calc
      x = 1 * x := by ring
      _ ≡ 330 * x [MOD 47] := Nat.ModEq.mul_right x (by rfl)
      _ = 11 * (30 * x) := by ring
      _ ≡ 11 * 42 [MOD 47] := Nat.ModEq.mul_left 11 hx
      _ = 462 := by ring
      _ ≡ 39 [MOD 47] := by rfl
    rw [Nat.ModEq, show 39 % 47 = 39 by rfl] at key
    rw [← key]
    exact Nat.mod_le x 47

constructor
  · rfl
  · intro x hx
    have h : x ≡ 39 [MOD 47] := calc
      x = 1 * x                  := (one_mul x).symm
      _ ≡ (11 * 30) * x [MOD 47] := (show 1 ≡ 11 * 30 [MOD 47] by rfl).mul_right x
      _ = 11 * (30 * x)          := mul_assoc 11 30 x
      _ ≡ 11 * 42 [MOD 47]       := hx.mul_left 11
      _ ≡ 39 [MOD 47]            := by rfl
    rw [Nat.ModEq, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt (show 39 < 47 by norm_num)] at h
    rw [← h]
    exact Nat.mod_le x 47

constructor
  · rfl
  · intro x hx
    replace hx := Nat.ModEq.mul_left 11 hx
    unfold Nat.ModEq at hx
    rw [← mul_assoc, Nat.mul_mod, show 11 * 30 % 47 = 1 by rfl] at hx
    simp only [one_mul, Nat.mod_mod] at hx
    norm_num at hx
    rw [← hx]
    apply Nat.mod_le

constructor
  · rfl
  · intro x hx
    have h : 11 * (30 * x) ≡ 11 * 42 [MOD 47] := Nat.ModEq.mul_left 11 hx
    rw [show 11 * (30 * x) = x + 47 * (7 * x) by ring,
        show 11 * 42 = 39 + 47 * 9 by norm_num] at h
    simp [Nat.ModEq, Nat.add_mul_mod_self_left] at h
    norm_num at h
    rw [← h]
    apply Nat.mod_le
